name: Vinaya Sri
tagline:
Building AI tools and performance systems
that solve real-world problems.
engineering_journal: This week I refactored the FastAPI routes for the AI Resume Builder, wired up authentication, and cut PDF generation time roughly in half.

building.name: AI Resume Builder
building.desc:
AI-powered system that converts resumes into
ATS-friendly LaTeX templates.

building.name: PAAW
building.desc:
Personal AI assistant with MCP integration,
graph memory and local LLM support.

building.name: Performance Engineering
building.desc:
Optimizing enterprise diagnostic workflows —
reduced memory & disk usage by 90%.

learning_quote: Every day I try to learn, build and ship something that makes me a better engineer.
footer: Thanks for visiting! Let's build something amazing together 🚀
